phase: Phase 5: Parcel Statistics, Zoning Summary, and Governance API Integration

feature_flag.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API
feature_flag.false_behavior: Parcel intelligence summary panels use generated static artifacts.
feature_flag.true_behavior: Parcel intelligence summary panels request their corresponding FastAPI endpoint.
feature_flag.fallback_behavior: Each panel falls back independently to generated static artifacts if its backend request fails, times out, or returns an invalid shape.

panels_migrated.fallback: static parcel quality metrics from generated parcel dashboard artifacts
static zoning jurisdiction distribution from generated parcel zoning QA artifacts
static governance warning distribution from generated parcel zoning QA artifacts

fallback_behavior_per_panel.ParcelIntelligencePanel: Falls back through useParcelDashboardMetrics if GET /parcels/statistics fails.
fallback_behavior_per_panel.ParcelQualityPanel: Falls back through useParcelQualityMetrics if GET /parcels/statistics fails.
fallback_behavior_per_panel.ZoningDistributionPanel: Falls back through useParcelZoningSummaryMetrics if GET /parcels/zoning-summary fails.
fallback_behavior_per_panel.GovernanceWarningsPanel: Falls back through useParcelGovernanceWarningsMetrics if GET /parcels/governance-warnings fails.

app_server_smoke.note: A temporary production server was started on port 3001 and stopped after the smoke check because the existing port 3000 dev server was accepting TCP but not returning HTTP within the timeout.

validation.browser_smoke_note: Browser plugin tools were not exposed in this session, so interactive flag-on/fallback panel clicks were not browser-tested. Endpoint shape checks, static artifact checks, typecheck, lint, and production build all passed.
